properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This dry and desert land I tell myself, "Keep walking on" Hear something up ahead Water falling like a song

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: An everlasting stream Your river carries me home Let it flow, let if flow

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Open the heavens Come Living Water All my fountains are in You You're strong like a river Your love is running through All my fountains are in You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: A flood for my soul A well that never will run dry I've rambled on my own Never believing I would find

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Come on, and rain down on us Rain down on us, Lord
